parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ results: [{ toolCallId: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_call_id, result: "I'm sorry, I had trouble understanding the date and time you mentioned. Could you please tell me the exact date and time for your appointment? For example, 'Monday May 12th at 2 PM'." }] }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.user_id, vapi_call_id: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.call_id, caller_name: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_name, caller_number: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.caller_number || $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_phone, caller_email: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_email, service_type: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.service_type, preferred_time: $('Validate & Parse Time').first().json.tool_params.preferred_time, preferred_time_iso: $('Validate & Parse Time').first().json.preferred_time_iso, preferred_time_human: $('Validate & Parse Time').first().json.preferred_time_human, message: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.notes, type: 'appointment', status: 'confirmed', gcal_event_id: $json.id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.user_id, event_type: 'appointment_booked', timestamp: $now.toISO(), data: { caller_name: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_name, caller_phone: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.caller_number || $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_phone, caller_email: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_email, service: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.service_type, appointment_time: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.preferred_time, notes: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.notes, business_name: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.business_name, notification_email: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.notification_email } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ results: [{ toolCallId: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_call_id, result: 'Perfect, I have booked ' + ($('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.service_type || 'your appointment') + ' for ' + ($('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_name || 'you') + ' on ' + ($('Validate & Parse Time').first().json.preferred_time_human || $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.preferred_time || 'the requested time') + '. You will receive a confirmation shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with?' }] }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.user_id, event_type: 'appointment_cancelled', timestamp: $now.toISO(), data: { caller_phone: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.caller_number || $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_phone, event_id: $('Find Event to Cancel').first().json.event_id, business_name: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.business_name, notification_email: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.notification_email } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ results: [{ toolCallId: $('Find Event to Cancel').first().json.tool_call_id, result: $('Find Event to Cancel').first().json.found ? 'Your appointment has been cancelled. Is there anything else I can help you with?' : 'I could not find an appointment under that phone number. Is there anything else I can help you with?' }] }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.user_id, event_type: 'appointment_rescheduled', timestamp: $now.toISO(), data: { caller_phone: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.caller_number || $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_phone, new_time: $('Match Event for Reschedule').first().json.new_start_time, event_id: $('Match Event for Reschedule').first().json.event_id, business_name: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.business_name, notification_email: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.notification_email } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ results: [{ toolCallId: $('Match Event for Reschedule').first().json.tool_call_id, result: $('Match Event for Reschedule').first().json.found ? ('Your appointment has been rescheduled to ' + $('Match Event for Reschedule').first().json.new_start_time + '. Is there anything else I can help you with?') : 'I could not find an appointment under that phone number. Is there anything else I can help you with?' }] }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.user_id, vapi_call_id: $json.call_id, caller_name: $json.tool_params.caller_name, caller_number: $json.caller_number, message: $json.tool_params.message || $json.tool_params.reason, type: 'message', status: 'pending' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.user_id, event_type: 'message_taken', timestamp: $now.toISO(), data: { caller_name: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_name, caller_phone: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.caller_number, message: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.message || $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.reason, business_name: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.business_name, notification_email: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.notification_email } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ results: [{ toolCallId: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_call_id, result: 'Got it, I have taken your message' + ($('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_name ? ', ' + $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_name : '') + '. Someone from ' + $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.business_name + ' will get back to you as soon as possible. Is there anything else I can help you with?' }] }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.user_id, vapi_call_id: $json.call_id, caller_name: $json.tool_params.caller_name, caller_number: $json.caller_number, message: $json.tool_params.reason || 'Callback requested', type: 'callback', status: 'pending' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.user_id, event_type: 'callback_requested', timestamp: $now.toISO(), data: { caller_name: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_name, caller_phone: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.caller_number, reason: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.reason, business_name: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.business_name, notification_email: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.notification_email } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ results: [{ toolCallId: $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_call_id, result: 'Noted! I have logged a callback request' + ($('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_name ? ' for ' + $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.tool_params.caller_name : '') + '. Someone from ' + $('Merge Config + Tool').first().json.business_name + ' will call you back shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with?' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ results: [{ toolCallId: $json.tool_call_id, result: ($json.business_hours && Object.keys($json.business_hours).length > 0) ? ($json.business_name + ' is open: ' + Object.entries($json.business_hours).map(([k,v]) => k + ': ' + v).join(', ') + '. Is there anything else I can help you with?') : ('Please contact ' + $json.business_name + ' directly for current business hours. Is there anything else I can help you with?') }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ results: [{ toolCallId: $json.tool_call_id, result: $json.fallback_message || ('I have noted your request. Someone from ' + ($json.business_name || 'us') + ' will follow up with you shortly.') }] }) }}
